newsSinceJun6: No identifiable fundamental catalyst on June 9 despite a +20.0% day move. Backdrop remains the known AI-server MLCC/inductor cycle: FY2025 net profit up ~5.4x on AI server MLCC demand, FY2026 guidance of +8% revenue and +50% operating income, May 2026 MLCC price hikes of ~6-13%, and sell-side upgrades (Mizuho to Buy; US brokerage target hike to ~JPY 7,100 - now far below the JPY 17,975 print). Stock is up ~129% in a month and ~389% YTD; today's spike looks flow/momentum-driven (chase/squeeze into a parabolic chart), not new fundamental evidence.

sources.label: BigGo Finance - Taiyo Yuden profit surges 5.4x on AI server MLCC demand; target hiked to JPY 7,100
DigiTimes - MLCC, inductor prices climb as AI demand meets cost pressure (May 2026 price hikes)
Investing.com - Mizuho upgrades Taiyo Yuden to Buy on MLCC demand and margin expansion
TradingView - TSE:6976 quote and momentum statistics

verdicts.rankRationale: On a crowding-sensitive alpha list, a +20% single-day spike with no identifiable new fundamental news - on top of +389% YTD and a price now ~2.5x above freshly hiked sell-side targets - is a textbook post-rerating chase; residual alpha shrinks further even though the bottleneck thesis is intact.
verdicts.bull: AI-server MLCC/inductor content per box keeps rising (up to ~30k MLCCs per AI server), price hikes of 6-13% stick, and FY26's +50% operating income guidance proves the cycle has pricing power, not just volume.
verdicts.neutral: The thesis is real but fully discovered: book/bill 1.3, upgrades in hand, and the stock already discounts multiple years of AI passives growth; from here it trades as a momentum benchmark, not an alpha source.
verdicts.bear: Parabolic flow-driven move (+129% in a month) far beyond analyst targets invites a violent air-pocket; any MLCC pricing or AI-server order wobble could unwind 30-50% with no valuation support.
verdicts.primaryCatalyst: Q1 FY2026 results and evidence that May price hikes plus AI-server MLCC mix are driving guidance raises beyond the +50% OP plan.
verdicts.primaryRisk: Momentum/flow reversal in a name now priced ~2.5x above hiked sell-side targets; crowding unwind dwarfs fundamental drift.
